descriptions.text: Disney's Ariel: The Little Mermaid is an Action game, developed by Blue Sky Software and published by Tec Toy, which was released in South America in 1992.
1992 video game programmed by BlueSky Software for Sega consoles
videojuego de 1992 desarrollado por BlueSky Software para consolas de Sega

Disney's Ariel the Little Mermaid, usually shorted to simply Ariel the Little Mermaid, is a 1992 action-adventure video game developed by BlueSky Software and published by Sega for the Sega Genesis, Game Gear, and Master System. It is based on the 1989 Disney film The Little Mermaid. 
Critically, Ariel the Little Mermaid was poorly received for its low difficulty and completion time, and was negatively compared to Ecco the Dolphin. A Master System version was released exclusively in Brazil by Tec Toy.

Ariel the Little Mermaid (Ariel la petite sirène) est un jeu vidéo tiré du film La Petite Sirène des studios Disney, développé par BlueSky Software et édité par Sega en 1992 sur Mega Drive, Game Gear et Master System. Le jeu permet au joueur de contrôler Ariel, la protagoniste du film, ou le roi Triton, son père, pour détruire la sorcière des mers Ursula.

Ariel the Little Mermaid es un videojuego publicado para Mega Drive y Game Gear en 1992 y para Master System en noviembre de 1996 en Brasil. Fue desarrollado por BlueSky Software y publicado por Sega.

Ariel the Little Mermaid — компьютерная игра по мотивам диснеевского мультфильма «Русалочка», выпущенная компанией Sega в 1992 году для приставок Mega Drive/Genesis и Game Gear (в Бразилии компания Tec Toy также портировала игру на Master System).
